scripts.test:services: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.tmp/service-tests',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const files=fs.readdirSync('.tmp/service-tests/tests').filter((file)=>file.endsWith('.test.js')).map((file)=>'.tmp/service-tests/tests/'+file);const result=cp.spawnSync(process.execPath,['--test',...files],{stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
